title: Kults Sculk Catalyst
description: Adds a simple crafting recipe for the Sculk Catalyst
body:
This mod is to add a crafting recipe to the Sculk Catalyst block.</br>
To most this may be useless. It uses vanilla items and isn't too expensive to craft.</br>
The main goal is to help balance out my modpack
[https://modrinth.com/modpack/kults-magic-pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kults-magic-pack)

Here the catalyst is used to decreese mob levels from this mod:</br>
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/hostile-mobs-improve-over-time](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hostile-mobs-improve-over-time)
